Description:
Ballistics of the 3VBM9 Zakolka APFSDS fired from the 125mm tank gun D-81. Assumes muzzle velocity of 1730 m/s from secondary sources.

Shot	Proj	Mass	Inc.	Main Charge		Remark
3VBM9	3BM22	6.55 kg	3BM23	4Zh40, 4Zh52		Zakolka

Inc. Charge:		3.4 kg 16/1 V/A
Charge 4Zh52:		5.0 kg 12/7 V/A
Charge 4Zh40:		3.0 kg 15/1 V/A + 2.0 kg 12/7 V/A
4Zh40 (introudced in 1962) is interchangeable with 4Zh52 (introudced in 1976). For simplicity the 4Zh52 ballistics is modeled.

References:
- 125-мм ТАНКОВЫЕ ПУШКИ 2A26, 2A46, 2A46-1, 2A46-M, 2A46M-1, 2A46-2 ТЕХНИЧЕСКОЕ ОПИСАНИЕ И ИНСТРУКЦИЯ ПО ЭКСПЛУАТАЦИИ, Часть 3 БОЕПРИПАСЫ. МИНИСТЕРСТВО ОБОРОНЫ СССР. Москва, 1974

- ST 250/04/005 Schusstafeln für die 125 mm Panzerkanone D-81 Ausgabejahr 1981 
- Schusstafel für die 125 mm Kanone D-81 (2A46, 2A46M), Stand 1987
